side_effects.description: Still hungry 3 days into second shot despite being in ketosis and eating ~1500 cals/day; no appetite suppression experienced

protocol_notes: 3 days into second shot of Tirzepatide. Has been in ketosis for about a month eating approximately 1500 calories per day. Considering upping dosage early but planning to follow recommended titration. Wife and sister both had immediate hunger suppression within hours of first shot.
